project.name: fzlprocess-archetype
project.description: Archetype for FzlBPMS process projects. Usage: mvn archetype:generate -B -DarchetypeGroupId=br.com.fzlbpms -DarchetypeArtifactId=fzlprocess-archetype -DarchetypeVersion=1.0-SNAPSHOT -DgroupId=br.com.fzlbpms.processes -DartifactId=my-process -Dversion=1.0-SNAPSHOT See documentation/bpmns/index.org for the full tutorial.
